message: Read project/error.log and tell me what's going on.
How many unique error types are there?
I think the connection timeout errors are from the load balancer health checks. Ignore those.
Actually no, the health check timeouts ARE a problem — they started after we upgraded the LB firmware last Tuesday.
The auth failures are from a bot trying to brute force the admin panel. We've already blocked the IP.
What's the most concerning error pattern after filtering out the bot auth failures?
Check the Makefile — is there a target for running the integration tests?
Run the lint target and see what it does.
The memory leak warnings — those correlate with the docker-compose services. Check if any containers have no memory limits.
Which services in docker-compose.yaml have no resource limits?
Add 512MB memory limits to any service that doesn't have one.
Wait, the redis container should have 1GB, not 512MB. Fix that.
Summarize the error investigation and what we've concluded.
